verses.text: Na mite in hong uk kumpite leh aana neite' thu mangin, thuhoih khempeuh a sem dingin a kigingsa-in a om ding uh phawksak in la
kuamah gensia loin, mite tawh kilemin kikhawl thei-in, lungsim nemin, mi khempeuh tungah a dikna ding uh na gen in

Bang hang hiam cih leh eite zong nidangin haitatin, thumang loin, vakvai-in, duhna deihna a tuamtuamte thuaklahin, thusia leh en'na lungsim tawh a gamtate, mite in hong mudahin, eite khatlekhat zong a kimudah ngeite ihi hi
Ahi zongin eite hong Honpa ahi Pasian' itna leh a migitna thu hong kilat ciangin

amah in eite hong honkhia hi. Eite in na hoih i sepzawhna hangin hong honkhia hiloin eite tungah suahtakna leh nuntakna thak a hong pia Kha Siangtho in hong sawpsiangna hangin a hong hehpihna tawh a hong honkhia ahi hi
Pasian in eite hong Hon Jesuh Khrih hangin eite tungah a kicing takin Kha Siangtho hong pia ahih manin
ama hong hehpihna hangin Pasian tawh kilemin i lamet nuntak tawntungna a ngah thei ihi hi

Hih ka thugente a man mahmah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian' thu a um mite in gamtat hoih a neihtheihnadingun hih ka hong thugente na lim ngaihsut ding ka deih hi. Ka hong thugente a hoih hi a, mite-a' dingin a manpha vive ahi hi
Ahi zongin a haihuai thu kiselna, min kigual deudau khangsimna, kitotna, thukham kitotlawhna cihte na pelh in. Tuate a kiman'na a omlo, a mawkna thu hi lel hi
Kitot, kikhenna ding a piangsak mite pen khatvei nihvei bang na hilh khit ciangin kisukha nawn vet kei in
Tua bang mite a kisiakhin hi a, a mawhna un a khialhna uh a kilangsak ahihna thu na thei in.
Artemas ahi a, Tikhikas ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh nang kiangah ka hong paisak ciangin, Nikopolis khua-ah phalbi sung omsawm ka hih manin, kei omna tua khua-ah nong paitheihna dingin hong hanciam in
Sitni Zenas leh Apollos-te a khualzinna uh manlang takin a paisuak theihna dingun na hihtheih bangin na huh in la, lamkalah kisapna bangmah a neihkhak lohna ding uh zong na thei in
I mite ommawk loin, thu kisam a phamawhte huh thei-in, na hoih na phate a septheihna dingun na hilh in.
Kei tawh a om mi khempeuh in nang hong hopih uh hi. Thu upna sungah ei hong itte khempeuh na na hopihsak in. Note khempeuh tungah Pasian' hehpihna thupha hong tung ta hen.
